examples: Outflow channels are probably relics of catastrophic flooding on Mars long ago.
Flooding shaped the outflow channels approximately 3 billion years ago, about the same times as the northern volcanic plains formed.
Even setting aside the unproven hints of ancient oceans, the extent of the outflow channels suggests that a huge total volume of water existed on Mars in the past.
The outflow of the river is about 10% of what it was in the 1940s.
It is possible that Spanish banks, in particular, could be hit by an outflow of deposits.
